title: Aphyllon validum
intro: Aphyllon validum, also known as yellow jessamine, is a flowering plant that is native to the southeastern United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its health benefits, including its potential to lower blood pressure, improve mood, and reduce stress. The bioactive constituents of Aphyllon validum include alkaloids, glycosides, and flavonoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Traditionally, Aphyllon validum has been used to prepare teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to treat a variety of ailments, including anxiety and insomnia.
